notableEvents.label: James Wood plunked
notableEvents.detail: James Wood hit by pitch. Nasim Nuñez scores. Jorbit Vivas to 3rd. Drew Millas to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Matt Chapman reaches on a fielder's choice. Luis Arraez to 2nd. Luis Arraez advances to 2nd, on a fielding error by third baseman Jorbit Vivas.

notableEvents.label: Error-aided run(s) allowed
notableEvents.detail: Casey Schmitt doubles (6) on a line drive to left fielder Daylen Lile. Luis Arraez scores. Matt Chapman scores. Fielding error by left fielder Daylen Lile.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error

notableEvents.label: Pickoff

notableEvents.detail: Curtis Mead pops out to first baseman Rafael Devers.

notableEvents.label: Curtis Mead pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Curtis Mead reaches on a fielder's choice out, third baseman Matt Chapman to catcher Patrick Bailey. Jorbit Vivas out at home. James Wood to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Brady House pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Giants challenged (timing play), call on the field was upheld: Brady House singles on a fly ball to center fielder Drew Gilbert. James Wood scores. Curtis Mead out at 3rd on the throw, center fielder Drew Gilbert to third baseman Matt Chapman.
